title: Toasty Roasted Polish Bread Rolls Grill
description: A comforting Polish dish featuring roasted bread rolls, perfect for a low-calorie friendly snack, with a crispy shattering crust and a soft interior. It is roasted to perfection on the grill.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, and dried oregano.
Brush the mixture onto the bread rolls, making sure to coat them evenly.
Place the bread rolls on the grill and roast for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
If using cheese, sprinkle it on top of the bread rolls and return to the grill for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until melted.
Remove the bread rolls from the grill and let them cool for a few minutes.
Serve the toasted bread rolls warm, enjoying the crispy shattering crust and soft interior.
